## Testing

<!-- How did you test this change? -->
- [ ] `dotnet build` succeeds
- [ ] `dotnet test` passes

## Checklist

- [ ] I've read the [CONTRIBUTING](../CONTRIBUTING.md) guide
- [ ] Code style matches the existing files (snake_case, localized UI strings)
- [ ] Commits have meaningful messages
